title: PM Lane 314 - Project Miner Temp Power Actuals Route Publication Gate After Authenticated Redeploy
authority_basis: Standing PM blocker authority and repo technical authority, used here to publish the admitted Temp Power actuals slice to clean-main, let the existing Render service auto-deploy it, and close the publication gate with hosted smoke evidence.
activation_condition: The existing mutation-seam service is live on current committed clean-main.
Both hosted seam URLs still omit the Temp Power actuals routes and return framework 404 for the actuals readback route.
The admitted actuals route slice remains modified or untracked in the local worktree rather than published in clean-main.
current_truth: The admitted Temp Power actuals route implementation and proof slice were published to clean-main as commit 3d47834eb32aa29b80152df3973f91d7c62a2e30.
Render auto-deploy picked up that commit as deployment dep-d85j0a37uimc738l7060 and the deploy reached live on the existing mutation-seam service.

Bounded hosted smoke now passes on both https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com and https://apex-platform-mutation-seam.onrender.com with the Temp Power actuals routes present and the actuals status readback returning 200.
There is no remaining blocker inside the admitted Temp Power actuals capture-review slice.
allowed_actions: Publish only the admitted Temp Power actuals route slice to clean-main using the existing repo boundary.
After publication, rely on auto-deploy or rerun the existing Lane 308 bounded redeploy step against the same service.
Rerun the bounded hosted smoke with --include-temp-power-actuals-review after publication.
not_allowed: No SQL or schema widening beyond the already-authored admitted slice.
No auth, ingress, DNS, or secret changes.
No finance, delivery, or source-writeback widening.
validation: Focused pytest for temp power actuals capture review persistence
Render deploy dep-d85j0a37uimc738l7060 reaches live on commit 3d47834eb32aa29b80152df3973f91d7c62a2e30
Bounded hosted smoke passes on both the custom domain and the Render hostname
validation_result: PASS: publication closed the blocker, Render promoted the admitted slice, and both hosted seam URLs now expose the Temp Power actuals routes with passing bounded smoke.
